health_conditions: Long COVID - producing virtually no IGF-1 since 2020

benefits.description: Subjectively and measurably (Garmin) improves sleep slightly; still doesn't feel like sleeping properly but it's slightly better

protocol_notes: IGF-1 was fine/a bit on the high side before COVID in 2020; now produces virtually none. Sermorelin raises IGF-1 a bit. Did GI Map with Zonulin gut microbiome test.
